name: Mirror Image
author: Poki
description: Mirror Image is a mind-bending puzzle game where you control a powerful Warlock with mirror powers. Draw a line to teleport, flipping to the opposite side in a mirrored jump. Master this unique movement to outwit enemies, solve tricky challenges, and reclaim your home. Think ahead, teleport wisely, and embrace the magic of the mirror! How to play Mirror Image? Use the mouse to draw a mirrored path! Who created Mirror Image? Mirror Image was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Mirror Image for free? You can play Mirror Image for free on Poki.
